title: lithospermum calcicola
intro: Lithospermum calcicola is a plant species commonly known as calcicole gromwell or mountain gromwell. It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, skin issues, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Lithospermum calcicola can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote wound healing, improve digestion, and boost the immune system.
